---
name: Feature request / 功能请求
about: Suggest an idea for HunTianDB / 为 HunTianDB 提出新想法
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement / 问题描述

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
**该功能请求是否与某个问题相关？请描述。**

(A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex: I'm always frustrated when [...])
（清晰简洁地描述问题所在，例如：当 [...] 时我总是很困扰。）

---

## Proposed Solution / 建议的解决方案

**Describe the solution you'd like.**
**请描述你期望的解决方案。**

(A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.)
（清晰简洁地描述你希望发生的事情。）

---

## Alternative Solutions / 替代方案

**Describe alternatives you've considered.**
**描述你考虑过的其他方案。**

(A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.)
（清晰简洁地描述你考虑过的任何替代解决方案或功能。）

---

## Impact / 影响

**Which area(s) would this feature affect?**
**该功能影响哪些方面？**

- [ ] PG Wire Protocol (SQL parsing, execution, response)
- [ ] WAL / Recovery (write‑ahead log, crash recovery)
- [ ] Storage Engine (data layout, indexing, compaction)
- [ ] Security (authentication, encryption, RBAC)
- [ ] REST API (endpoints, request/response)
- [ ] Benchmark / Testing
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: **\_\_\_**

---

## Use Case / 使用场景

(Describe a real‑world scenario where this feature would be useful.)
（描述该功能在实际场景中的用处。）

---

## Additional Context / 附加信息

(Add any other context, diagrams, references, or examples here.)
（在此添加任何其他背景、图表、参考资料或示例。）
